title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes
creator: Arthur Conan Doyle
license: Public domain (text: Project Gutenberg #1661 / audio: LibriVox)
description: The twelve classic Sherlock Holmes stories, from 'A Scandal in Bohemia' to 'The Copper Beeches'. Dialogue-rich and tightly plotted — ideal for the per-speaker visual system.
